svg.title: cxplus — wordmark (dark, flat)
svg.desc: Static dark-mode cxplus wordmark with accent plus; no CSS variables or animations.

g.font-family: Nunito, 'SF Pro Rounded', 'Avenir Next Rounded', Quicksand, 'Segoe UI Rounded', Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', 'Arial Rounded MT Bold', Arial, 'Noto Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif
